headline: Blackstone Private Credit Limits Redemptions: It's "a Feature, Not a Bug"
summary: Private credit funds are being swamped with redemption requests, but redemption limits aren't necessarily a bad thing.

headline: Blackstone (BX) Funds to Buy Hyatt Regency San Francisco
summary: Blackstone Inc. (NYSE:BX) is one of the 12 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On June 23, 2026, Sunstone Hotel (SHO) announced a definitive agreement to sell the 821-room Hyatt Regency San Francisco to funds affiliated with Blackstone Inc. (NYSE:BX) Real Estate for a gross sale price of $279M, or about $340,000 per […]
